questions.question: Describe the key difference between RMSprop and Adam optimization algorithms. (5 marks)
questions.hint: RMSprop and Adam are both adaptive learning rate methods

questions.question: What is the role of the learning rate in RMSprop and Adam algorithms? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The learning rate determines how quickly the weights are updated

questions.question: How does the exponential moving average feature in Adam algorithm impact the learning rate? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The exponential moving average helps to stabilize the learning rate
